title: thymus serpyllum f. ellipticus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. ellipticus, also known as Wild Thyme or Thyme, is a flowering plant in the mint family, native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. ellipticus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as a natural expectorant, which helps relieve congestion. Thymus serpyllum f. ellipticus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb for topical application, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
